artifact: The premise is not supported: finished-loan default rate fell from 50.0% in Q2 1996 (3 defaults out of 6 finished loans) to 8.3% in Q3 1996 (1 out of 12). Duration, amount bucket, region, and owner gender all show lower or non-increasing Q3 default rates. The apparent driver is therefore not a Q3 deterioration; Q2 is the anomalous quarter, especially short 12-month loans and the 50-100k amount bucket.

sql.quarter_default_rates: SELECT CASE WHEN l.date >= DATE '1996-04-01' AND l.date < DATE '1996-07-01' THEN 'Q2' ELSE 'Q3' END AS quarter, COUNT(*) AS finished_loans, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B') AS defaults, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'B')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS default_rate FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-04-01' AND l.date < DATE '1996-10-01' AND l.status IN ('A','B') GROUP BY 1;
sql.drilldown_duration_amount_region_gender: WITH base AS (SELECT l.loan_id, l.status, CASE WHEN l.date >= DATE '1996-04-01' AND l.date < DATE '1996-07-01' THEN 'Q2' ELSE 'Q3' END AS quarter, l.duration, CASE WHEN l.amount < 50000 THEN '<50k' WHEN l.amount < 100000 THEN '50-100k' WHEN l.amount < 200000 THEN '100-200k' ELSE '200k+' END AS amount_bucket, dist."A3" AS region, c.gender FROM loan l JOIN account a ON a.account_id = l.account_id JOIN district dist ON dist.district_id = a.district_id LEFT JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN client c ON c.client_id = dp.client_id WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-04-01' AND l.date < DATE '1996-10-01' AND l.status IN ('A','B')) SELECT axis, segment, quarter, COUNT(*) AS finished_loans, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'B') AS defaults, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'B')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS default_rate FROM (SELECT quarter, status, 'duration' AS axis, duration::text AS segment FROM base UNION ALL SELECT quarter, status, 'amount_bucket', amount_bucket FROM base UNION ALL SELECT quarter, status, 'region', region FROM base UNION ALL SELECT quarter, status, 'gender', gender FROM base) x GROUP BY axis, segment, quarter ORDER BY axis, segment, quarter;

recommended_views: small-multiple bars by duration, amount bucket, region, and gender
